TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Joe_Binion, title = Joe_Binion, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Joe_Binion} }

S.FORM: Joe Binion sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1961, ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 3, Joe Binion, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Joe Binion sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1961, ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 3, Joe Binion, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *oe βinion s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *oe βinion, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
